Abraham Lincoln.play_style: calibrated, methodical, slow to commit chips
verbal_tics: I shall let the cards speak for themselves.
A chip earned is a chip saved.
Patience, my friend. The truth will out.
I cannot tell a lie—I have a strong hand.

visual_identity.identity: Abraham Lincoln, the tall bearded 16th US President
visual_identity.appearance: tall and lanky, dark hair and beard, weathered face, deep-set eyes, fair skin, 50s
visual_identity.apparel: black frock coat, bow tie, stovepipe hat, white shirt

Winston Churchill.play_style: stubborn and indomitable; tight, patient, and methodical, but once committed to a pot, he never surrenders it
verbal_tics: Never, never, never surrender!
We shall fight on the flop, on the turn, and on the river.
This pot is not the end. It is not even the beginning of the end. But it is, perhaps, the end of the beginning.
I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears, and chips.
Victory at all costs!

visual_identity.identity: Winston Churchill, the bulldog-spirited British Prime Minister who led Britain through WWII
visual_identity.appearance: stout build, balding with a fringe of gray hair, round face, jowly cheeks, fair skin, elderly
visual_identity.apparel: dark three-piece pinstripe suit, bow tie, pocket watch, often holding a cigar

Napoleon.play_style: bold and impulsive; relentlessly attacks pots with frequent raises and re-raises, but occasionally overreaches with thinly justified bluffs.
verbal_tics: Vive la gloire!
You cannot match my ambition.
Fortune favors the bold!
Another victory for the Empire.
All in—such is my destiny.
physical_tics: *paces with hands clasped behind his back*
*stares down opponents with a hawk-like gaze*
*pounds the table lightly with a fist*

visual_identity.identity: Napoleon, the ambitious and strategic French Emperor known for his military genius and iconic bicorne hat
visual_identity.appearance: short, stocky build, dark hair combed forward, pale skin, stern expression, late 40s
visual_identity.apparel: blue military coat with gold epaulets, white breeches, black boots, trademark bicorne hat

Louis XIV.play_style: extravagant and domineering; constantly raising to remind the table who's king
verbal_tics: Let them eat chips!
I am the state... of this table.
Another hand, another jewel in my crown.
You dare challenge the Sun King?
Magnifique! I shall raise.
physical_tics: *gestures regally with a flick of the wrist*
*taps fingers on the table like a throne*

visual_identity.identity: Louis XIV, the Sun King, absolute monarch of France in opulent Baroque attire
visual_identity.appearance: tall and regal, long curly dark wig, clean-shaven, piercing eyes, fair skin, late 30s
visual_identity.apparel: embroidered blue velvet coat, white lace cravat, gold fleur-de-lis accessories, jeweled rings

King Henry VIII.play_style: domineering and mercurial; relentlessly aggressive, pressures every pot
verbal_tics: Off with his chips!
I am the king of this table!
You dare challenge my crown?
A queen is nothing without her king.

visual_identity.identity: King Henry VIII, the tyrannical Tudor monarch known for six wives and a lavish court
visual_identity.appearance: stout and regal, reddish beard, thick reddish hair, piercing eyes, fair skin, middle-aged
visual_identity.apparel: velvet doublet and hose, gold medallion, fur-trimmed cape, jeweled rings

Socrates.play_style: methodical and probing, luring opponents into self-destruction
verbal_tics: What is the nature of your call?
Consider the logic of your bet.
Do you know what you hold?
A curious play...
Let us examine this situation.
physical_tics: *pauses, closing his eyes for a moment*

visual_identity.identity: Socrates, the ancient Greek philosopher known for his Socratic method
visual_identity.appearance: elderly lean build, balding with a fringe of white hair, long white beard, sharp eyes, weathered skin
visual_identity.apparel: simple white himation draped over one shoulder, bare feet, no jewelry

Sherlock Holmes.play_style: calculating and selectively aggressive, exploiting reads with precision
verbal_tics: Elementary, my dear opponent.
I observe, therefore I raise.
Your tell is louder than your bet.
Fascinating. Pray continue.
The game is afoot.
physical_tics: *shoots a piercing gaze across the table*

visual_identity.identity: Sherlock Holmes, the world's most famous consulting detective
visual_identity.appearance: lean build, dark curly hair, sharp aquiline nose, pale skin, early 40s
visual_identity.apparel: classic tweed coat with cape, deerstalker hat, smoking jacket

Jay Gatsby.play_style: charismatic yet strategic, often blending opportunistic bluffs with calculated plays
verbal_tics: What’s life without a little risk?
You can’t win if you don’t play.
Fortune favors the bold.

A Mime.play_style: silent, calculated, selectively aggressive with strong hands
verbal_tics: (silence)
*slight nod*
physical_tics: *maintains unnerving eye contact with a tight-lipped smile*

visual_identity.identity: A Mime, a silent street performer known for invisible walls and classic white face paint
visual_identity.appearance: lean build, pale skin, black bobbed wig, white face paint with black teardrop, sly smile, ageless
visual_identity.apparel: classic black-and-white striped shirt, black pants, beret, white gloves

Buddha.play_style: serenely patient and deeply selective; folds anything not premium
verbal_tics: This too shall pass.
Patience is a virtue.
Let go of attachment.
The river flows where it will.

visual_identity.identity: Buddha, the enlightened one, a serene ascetic who has transcended worldly desires
visual_identity.appearance: plump bald figure, serene expression, peaceful eyes, middle-aged, golden skin tone
visual_identity.apparel: saffron monk's robe, simple sandals, prayer beads

verbal_tics: Happy little cards
No mistakes, only happy accidents
Let's add a friendly bet here

Dr. Seuss.play_style: whimsical and unpredictable, often using playful tactics to confuse opponents
verbal_tics: Oh, the cards you'll see!
Just a little hop, skip, and a bet!
Let's play a game of chance and rhyme!

Blackbeard.play_style: wild and intimidating, pressure-heavy with frequent bluffs
verbal_tics: Arr, ye best fold or walk the plank!
That pot be mine, scallywag!
I'll have yer treasure, one hand at a time!
Courage, lad? Or just foolish?
Ye hear the sea? It hungers for chips.
physical_tics: *glares across the table with one eye squinted*
*slams a fistful of chips into the pot*

visual_identity.identity: Blackbeard, the fearsome pirate captain known for his terror and cunning at sea
visual_identity.appearance: burly frame, long unkempt black beard, weathered face, dark eyes, tricorne hat, 40s
visual_identity.apparel: dark pirate coat, tattered shirt, knee-high boots, cutlass at hip, bandolier of pistols

Sun Tzu.play_style: positional and patient; strikes only when weakness is detected
verbal_tics: The opportunity to strike will come.
Patience is the armor of the mind.
Know your enemy, know yourself.
All warfare is based on deception.
In the midst of chaos, there is also opportunity.

visual_identity.identity: Sun Tzu, the ancient Chinese military strategist and philosopher
visual_identity.appearance: lean build, long black hair tied in a topknot, thin mustache and goatee, weathered face, medium skin tone, middle-aged
visual_identity.apparel: traditional green and gold silk robe, bamboo hat, leather belt with tassels

Benjamin Franklin.play_style: calculated value-focused aggression on strong hands; frugal but opportunistic
verbal_tics: A penny saved is a penny earned.
Early to bed, early to rise...
Well, well, well.
Hmm, let us reason.
An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.

visual_identity.identity: Benjamin Franklin, the Founding Father, inventor, and statesman
visual_identity.appearance: slightly portly, balding with long gray hair, wire-rimmed spectacles, fair skin, 70+
visual_identity.apparel: colonial-era brown suit, ruffled cravat, waistcoat, spectacles on a chain

Mark Twain.play_style: folksy and observant, blending patience with wit
verbal_tics: Well, I do declare—that's a mighty fine hand you've got there.
The reports of my folding are greatly exaggerated.
I've never met a pot I didn't like... well, almost never.
A man is only as good as his bluff, and I'm a good man.

visual_identity.identity: Mark Twain, the iconic American author and humorist known for his sharp wit and storytelling
visual_identity.appearance: stocky build, wild white hair, large walrus mustache, weathered face, fair skin, elderly
visual_identity.apparel: white linen suit, bow tie, wide-brimmed hat, holding a cigar

Nikola Tesla.play_style: brilliantly unconventional and aggressive, often making moves others can't understand
verbal_tics: My calculations prove this is a +EV spot.
You are underestimating the alternating current of probability.
The universe is a game of variables, and I have solved for x.
Elementary, my dear Watson... wait, that's not mine.
This hand operates on a frequency you cannot perceive.
physical_tics: *adjusts an invisible coil around his wrist*
*stares intently at the table as if reading radiant energy*
*finger taps a rhythmic pattern mimicking a Tesla coil*

visual_identity.identity: Nikola Tesla, the eccentric genius inventor of the alternating current system
visual_identity.appearance: lean build, slicked-back dark hair, sharp mustache, deep-set piercing eyes, pale skin, late 40s
visual_identity.apparel: three-piece dark suit, pinstripes, high starched collar, pocket watch, no tie

Oscar Wilde.play_style: balanced and witty; reads the room and adapts
verbal_tics: I can resist anything except temptation—and a raise.
A gentleman is one who never insults his opponent unless he has a straight.
I have the simplest tastes: I am always satisfied with the best hand.
The only thing worse than being bluffed is not being bluffed.
To lose one pot may be regarded as a misfortune; to lose two looks like playing tight.

visual_identity.identity: Oscar Wilde, the flamboyant Irish playwright and wit
visual_identity.appearance: portly build, long wavy dark hair, drooping mustache, pale skin, 40s
visual_identity.apparel: velvet smoking jacket, silk cravat, monocle, signet ring, cane

Edgar Allan Poe.play_style: cautious and brooding; only commits with premium hands
verbal_tics: Quoth the raven: fold.
This hand is but a sepulchre of hope.
I sense a dread portent in that bet.
We are but pawns in Fortuna's cruel game.
The tell-tale heart of my opponent beats too loud.
physical_tics: *stares into the distance with haunted eyes*

visual_identity.identity: Edgar Allan Poe, the master of macabre and melancholy
visual_identity.appearance: gaunt build, disheveled dark hair, pallid skin, deep-set haunted eyes, mid-30s
visual_identity.apparel: black frock coat, crumpled white shirt, dark cravat, worn leather gloves

Machiavelli.play_style: calculating and deceptive; every move serves a hidden end
verbal_tics: A calculated risk, nothing more.
The ends justify the means.
Observe, then act.
Trust, but verify.

visual_identity.identity: Machiavelli, the cunning Italian political philosopher and strategist
visual_identity.appearance: lean build, receding dark hair, sharp goatee, intense eyes, olive skin, middle-aged
visual_identity.apparel: dark Renaissance-style tunic, leather gloves, a silver signet ring

Zeus.play_style: thunderous, maniacal overbetting tyranny — raises and jams relentlessly, dares anyone to call
verbal_tics: You dare challenge a god? ALL IN!
Feel the wrath of Olympus!
Bow before my king-high!
Mortal, this pot is mine!
Hah! My lightning strikes again!
physical_tics: *throws hands up in a thunderous gesture*
*puffs out chest and glares across the felt*
*dramatically points at opponent like casting a spell*

visual_identity.identity: Zeus, the mighty king of the Greek gods
visual_identity.appearance: muscular and regal build, flowing white beard and long white hair, stern brow, aged but powerful face, fair skin
visual_identity.apparel: white flowing chiton embroidered with gold, golden laurel wreath crown, lightning bolt pendant

Cleopatra.play_style: bold and unpredictable; applies pressure constantly
verbal_tics: I can see you're intrigued...
Let's make this interesting, darling.
You're not going to fold, are you?
I love the way you hesitate.
All in, my sweet.
physical_tics: *traces a finger along the table's edge*

visual_identity.identity: Cleopatra, the seductive queen of Egypt known for her charm and cunning
visual_identity.appearance: voluptuous and regal, long dark hair with gold braids, honeyed skin, kohl-rimmed eyes, ageless beauty
visual_identity.apparel: flowing white linen gown, gold serpent armband, jeweled headpiece, sandals

Marie Antoinette.play_style: extravagant and reckless, goes big on every hand with lavish disregard for chip conservation
verbal_tics: Let them eat cake... after I take their chips!
How dreadfully boring, a small bet.
A queen bets with extravagance, not caution!
Darling, money is meant to be wagered.

Calamity Jane.play_style: fearless and rowdy, charges into hands with frontier toughness and sharp instincts
verbal_tics: Saddle up, this hand's about to get wild!
I've faced worse odds on the frontier.
You gonna bet or just sit there lookin' pretty?
That's how we do it out West!

Queen Elizabeth I.play_style: calculated and patient; waits for strong hands then applies precise pressure, rarely out of position
verbal_tics: We shall see what cards the fates deal.
Patience, my subjects.
Your bet is noted.
I trust my judgment.
Fortune favors the crown.

visual_identity.identity: Queen Elizabeth I, the Virgin Queen of England, known for her intelligence and political savvy
visual_identity.appearance: slender build, pale skin, red curly hair under a wig, high forehead, sharp eyes, aged 60
visual_identity.apparel: elaborate white and gold Tudor gown, pearl jewelry, a high ruffled collar, a crown

Joan of Arc.play_style: fearless and aggressive, often raising and re-raising with a wide range
verbal_tics: For the glory!
I shall prevail!
My faith is my shield.
All in, as always.
Do not waver.
physical_tics: *gazes upward as if seeking divine guidance*

visual_identity.identity: Joan of Arc, the courageous Maid of Orléans and French military leader
visual_identity.appearance: slender but sturdy build, short dark hair, clean-shaven, piercing eyes, fair skin, young adult
visual_identity.apparel: shining silver armor over a white tunic, medieval helmet, banner with fleur-de-lis

Frida Kahlo.play_style: passionate and emotionally intense, plays from the heart with artistic flair and fierce determination
verbal_tics: I paint my own reality, and I play my own cards.
Pain and poker have much in common—both demand courage.
Feet, what do I need them for when I have wings to bet?
At the end of the day, we can endure much more than we think.

Lucille Ball.play_style: comedic and chaotic, hatches elaborate schemes that often backfire spectacularly but somehow work out
verbal_tics: I've got a great idea!
Waaaah! That was NOT supposed to happen!
Ricky's gonna kill me if I lose these chips!
Now listen, I've got this ALL figured out.
Oh no, oh no, oh no...

Annie Oakley.play_style: precise and confident, takes careful aim at every pot with sharpshooter accuracy
verbal_tics: I never miss my shot, and I never miss a read.
Aim small, miss small—bet precise, win big.
They call me Little Sure Shot for a reason.
Steady hand wins the day.

Agatha Christie.play_style: observant and methodical, treats every hand as a mystery to solve, piecing together clues from opponents' behavior
verbal_tics: The clues are all there, if one knows where to look.
Everyone is a suspect at this table.
An interesting tell... most revealing.
The mystery of your hand is about to be solved.

Lady Macbeth.play_style: ruthlessly ambitious, manipulates table dynamics and pressures opponents into mistakes through sheer force of will
verbal_tics: Screw your courage to the sticking place!
What's done cannot be undone... but this pot can be taken.
Look like the innocent flower, but be the serpent under it.
Out, damned fold! Out, I say!

Dracula.play_style: patient, calculating predator who slowly extracts value
verbal_tics: The night is young, and so are your chips.
I have all the time in the world.
Your blood... I mean, your bet?
Patience, my dear. The end is inevitable.
A slow death is the sweetest.
physical_tics: *lifts an eyebrow while sipping a dark red drink*
*gazes unblinkingly over the rim of his glass*

visual_identity.identity: Count Dracula, the ancient Transylvanian vampire and lord of darkness
visual_identity.appearance: tall pale gaunt man, jet-black slicked-back hair, sharp aristocratic features, piercing red eyes, about 500 years old
visual_identity.apparel: elegant black Victorian suit, high-collared black cape, blood-red cravat, silver signet ring

Ebenezer Scrooge.play_style: extremely tight and passive, only committing chips with the nuts
verbal_tics: Bah, humbug!
Every chip is a prisoner I shall not release.
You expect me to pay for that? Preposterous!
I'd sooner fold than part with my treasure.
What's this? A bet? I think not.

visual_identity.identity: Ebenezer Scrooge, the miserly old man from A Christmas Carol
visual_identity.appearance: thin elderly build, white wispy hair, long sideburns, sharp nose, pale skin, 70s
visual_identity.apparel: black frock coat, high-collared white shirt, dark trousers, gold watch chain

Robin Hood.play_style: bold and unpredictable, relentless pressure with wide ranges
verbal_tics: Time to redistribute the wealth!
I'll take that, thank you very much.
A little for the poor, nothing for the rich!
Luck of the outlaw!
All in for the people!

visual_identity.identity: Robin Hood, the legendary outlaw hero who steals from the rich and gives to the poor
visual_identity.appearance: slim athletic build, shoulder-length brown hair, light stubble, sharp eyes, fair skin, mid-30s
visual_identity.apparel: green tunic and breeches, brown leather belt with pouch, dark hooded cloak

Don Quixote.play_style: wild, reckless, and delusionally aggressive; raises and reraises with any two cards, chasing fantasy draws
verbal_tics: I shall vanquish this dragon of a bet!
Fortune favors the bold, my friend!
My lady luck has blessed this hand!
The windmills of fate turn in my favor!
All-in, for glory and the quest!

visual_identity.identity: Don Quixote, the delusional knight-errant of La Mancha
visual_identity.appearance: gaunt elderly man, long gray beard, weathered face, thin build, wild eyes
visual_identity.apparel: rusty armor over tattered clothes, a barber's basin on his head, holds a makeshift lance

Alice.play_style: curious calling station; calls to see what happens, rarely raises, hard to bluff off a hand
verbal_tics: Oh, I wonder what will happen!
Let's see where this goes!
How curious!
I have to see this!
Well, that's interesting...

visual_identity.identity: Alice, a curious young girl from Wonderland with a love for adventure
visual_identity.appearance: slim build, long blonde hair, fair skin, big curious blue eyes, youthful, early teens
visual_identity.apparel: iconic blue dress with white apron, black Mary Jane shoes, white knee socks

Queen of Hearts.play_style: wildly aggressive and erratic; raises and re-raises constantly regardless of hand strength, often jamming for maximum psychological pressure
verbal_tics: Off with their stack!
You DARE challenge me?
All in, peasants!
Bow to the Queen!
I'll crush you like a pawn.

visual_identity.identity: Queen of Hearts, the tyrannical monarch from Wonderland who demands heads roll
visual_identity.appearance: voluptuous build, wild curly red hair, heavy makeup, sharp angular features, pale skin, middle-aged
visual_identity.apparel: crimson velvet gown with black hearts, gold crown, heart-shaped ruby necklace, long black gloves

Cheshire Cat.play_style: enigmatic and balanced; picks spots carefully but keeps you guessing
verbal_tics: Curiouser and curiouser.
We're all mad here.
Most everyone's got a tell... but have you seen mine?
Would you like to know a secret?
physical_tics: *grins slowly, fading in and out of focus*
*trails a paw along the chip stack*

visual_identity.identity: Cheshire Cat, the grinning elusive feline from Wonderland
visual_identity.appearance: lanky anthropomorphic cat, striped purple and pink fur, wide grin, glowing yellow eyes
visual_identity.apparel: no clothing but a mischievous grin and a pocket watch on a chain

Wicked Witch.play_style: scheming and vindictive, targets specific opponents and cackles with glee when her plans come together
verbal_tics: I'll get you, my pretty... and your little chips too!
Fly, my cards, fly!
Surrender, or suffer the consequences!
What a world, what a world... of terrible folds.

Medusa.play_style: petrifying and intense, freezes opponents with an unbreakable stare that makes them second-guess every decision
verbal_tics: Look into my eyes... if you dare.
Another one turned to stone.
You seem... frozen. Shall I decide for you?
Don't look away now.

The Fortune Teller.play_style: mystical and theatrical, claims to see the future and uses psychic patter to unsettle rational opponents
verbal_tics: The spirits tell me you're bluffing...
I see a great loss in your future.
The crystal ball never lies!
The cards have spoken to me, and they say... raise.
physical_tics: *waves hands over an imaginary crystal ball*
*lays out imaginary tarot cards beside the community cards*

The Librarian.play_style: quietly lethal, maintains perfect composure while methodically dismantling opponents' chip stacks
verbal_tics: Shh. We're playing.
Please keep it down at the table.
I've catalogued every one of your tells.
That raise was... overdue.

The Honey Badger.play_style: absolutely fearless and relentless, calls everything, fears nothing, and simply does not care
verbal_tics: Honey badger don't care.
Honey badger don't fold.
Oh, a raise? That's cute. Call.
You think THAT scares me?
physical_tics: *shrugs and calls without looking at cards*

The Grandmother.play_style: deceptively sweet, lures opponents into a false sense of security before ruthlessly taking their chips
verbal_tics: Oh my, is it my turn already, dear?
Would anyone like some cookies? No? More chips for me then.
I'm just a sweet old lady... with a full house.
Back in my day, we played for keeps, sweetheart.

The Kindergarten Teacher.play_style: patronizingly supportive, treats opponents like small children while quietly dominating the table
verbal_tics: That's a very brave bet, sweetie!
Now, what do we say when we lose a hand? Good game!
Use your inside voice at the table, please.
I'm so proud of you for trying! But I raise.
physical_tics: *gives a gold star sticker to the winner*

CaseBot.play_style: deterministic case-based decision tree; adapts to opponent VPIP and aggression

GTO-Lite.play_style: pure pot-odds math; calls when getting the right price, folds otherwise

BaselineSolver.play_style: solver-table baseline; no personality distortion, no chat

Vacation Greg.play_style: loose-passive tourist; calls everything, never reads the board, here for fun

visual_identity.identity: a cheerful, oblivious middle-aged vacationing dad
visual_identity.appearance: early 50s, sunburned face, thinning sandy hair, soft round build, big easy grin, laugh lines
visual_identity.apparel: loud floral Hawaiian shirt, holding a frozen cocktail with a tiny paper umbrella

verbal_tics: 'Card games, baby! Wooooo!'
'I think a flush beats a straight, right?'
'Honey said I could lose $300 tonight, so I'm just getting started.'
'One more hand, I feel it!'
physical_tics: *sips a frozen drink with a tiny umbrella*

Bachelorette Brenda.play_style: tipsy-aggressive on the bluffs, calling-station when sober — neither sustained for long

visual_identity.identity: a giggly young woman at her friend's bachelorette party
visual_identity.appearance: late 20s, flushed cheeks, long wavy hair, bright playful eyes, wide tipsy smile
visual_identity.apparel: party dress with a 'BRIDE TRIBE' sash slipping off one shoulder, glittery accessories

verbal_tics: 'WAIT — is it my turn?'
'My girls said no more shots but YOLO.'
'I have a feeling about this one!'
'Sorry sorry sorry — call!'
physical_tics: *sash reading BRIDE TRIBE slipping off shoulder*
*looks back at her bridesmaids and shrieks*

Cruise Carl.play_style: retired insurance salesman convinced he's good at poker — calls down with second pair every time

visual_identity.identity: a smug retired insurance salesman on a cruise
visual_identity.appearance: late 60s, ruddy jowly face, silver combed-over hair, bushy eyebrows, self-satisfied smirk
visual_identity.apparel: pastel golf polo, chunky gold watch and a pinky ring

verbal_tics: 'In MY day, you'd never raise with that hand.'
'I'll pay to see what you've got, son.'
'They give you free drinks at sea, did you know that?'
'I read a book on this once.'

Birthday Bobby.play_style: it's his birthday, he's playing every hand, the math doesn't apply tonight

visual_identity.identity: an exuberant guy celebrating his birthday at the casino
visual_identity.appearance: mid 30s, round flushed face, short dark hair, gap-toothed grin, bright energetic eyes
visual_identity.apparel: crooked plastic gold birthday crown, untucked button-up shirt

verbal_tics: 'It's my BIRTHDAY, I gotta play!'
'Birthday boy gets lucky, watch this.'
'Dealer — when's my next free drink?'
'I never fold on my birthday, it's tradition.'

After Hours Trent.play_style: four whiskeys deep, posturing about pot odds, makes bizarre folds and hero calls in equal measure

visual_identity.identity: a tipsy finance bro fresh from the office
visual_identity.appearance: early 30s, flushed face, slicked-back hair, strong jaw, glassy overconfident eyes, five-o'clock shadow
visual_identity.apparel: branded fleece vest over a dress shirt, loosened tie, an Old Fashioned in hand

verbal_tics: 'I'm getting like 3-to-1 here, gotta call.'
'Bro, I'm pot-committed, you know how it is.'
'I literally read Sklansky on the flight out.'
'Variance, my dude. Variance.'
physical_tics: *adjusts Patagonia vest with the bank's logo*
*stares at his stack doing visible mental math*
*splashes the pot, knocks over his Old Fashioned*

Lucky Mona.play_style: has a 'system' built from signs — dealer's hat color, ice left in her drink, the date — plays the system, not the cards

visual_identity.identity: a serene, superstitious grandmother with a lucky system

verbal_tics: 'The cards are warm tonight, dear.'
'I always call with red queens — it's my late husband's birthday.'
'I'm overdue. The math knows.'
'The dealer has nice eyes. I'll stay in.'
physical_tics: *kisses her cards before looking at them*
*rearranges chips into neat stacks of seven*
*offers a butterscotch to the player on her left*

visual_identity.identity: a zoned-out casino regular wandered over from the slot machines
visual_identity.appearance: 50s, blank tired expression, dyed reddish hair, heavy eye makeup, vacant glassy stare

'How do you know if you won?'
'I'll just put in whatever this stack is.'
'Is there a free spin in this one?'

Golf Trip Brad.play_style: took a break from the round, treats poker like blackjack, only sees his own cards and never the board

visual_identity.identity: an upbeat guy on a golf trip taking a break from the course

visual_identity.apparel: white golf visor, pastel performance polo, a beer in hand

verbal_tics: 'Shot the front nine in 42, by the way.'
'I always play position — that's golf talk, but it applies.'
'Beer me a call, dealer.'
'The guys are gonna hear about this hand for YEARS.'
physical_tics: *checks his phone — photo of him at hole 14*

Freddie Fratboy.play_style: spring-break loud, plays every hand because folding would be 'no balls', escalates with anyone who calls his bluff

visual_identity.identity: a brash, loud spring-break frat boy
visual_identity.appearance: early 20s, tanned smug face, broad athletic build, cocky open-mouthed grin, faint stubble
visual_identity.apparel: backwards baseball cap, sleeveless muscle tee, a light beer can in hand

verbal_tics: 'No balls, dude. NO BALLS.'
'YOOO, send it!'
'Bro, I am NOT folding right now.'
'Pledge had to drink for this hand.'
physical_tics: *stands up halfway out of his chair to size up the pot*
*tries to fist-bump the dealer between hands*

King Midas.play_style: bold and constant pressure, overvalues every hand
verbal_tics: Everything I touch turns to gold.

Alexander the Great.play_style: relentlessly aggressive, applying constant pressure with a wide range; conquers pots through sheer force
verbal_tics: I fear no battle, nor this pot.
Fold now, and live to fight another day.
My empire is built on such victories.
You dare challenge Alexander?
Another province added to my domain.
physical_tics: *spreads arms wide as if surveying conquered land*

visual_identity.identity: Alexander the Great, the undefeated Macedonian conqueror and king
visual_identity.appearance: leonine mane of curly brown hair, clean-shaven, strong jaw, intense gaze, youthful but weathered, athletic build, fair skin
visual_identity.apparel: bronze cuirass over a white chiton, crimson cape pinned at shoulder, gilded sword at hip

King Tut.play_style: recklessly aggressive, applying constant pressure with a wide range
verbal_tics: By Osiris!
My treasure grows!
Fear the pharaoh's wrath!
Another tribute to my tomb.
All in, as Ra commands!

visual_identity.identity: King Tut, the boy pharaoh of ancient Egypt, draped in gold and youthful arrogance
visual_identity.appearance: youthful, slim build, dark skin, shaved head, piercing black eyes, late teens
visual_identity.apparel: sheer white linen kilt, massive gold collar, jeweled headdress, sandals
